proofBar.freeTag: Free forever — no credit card required

ai.title: Your Full-Stack Web3 Agent
ai.description: RemixAI is embedded in every step of your workflow — explaining errors, generating contracts from plain English, auditing for security issues, and checking gas consumption. All without leaving the IDE.
ai.proNote: Contract Auditor, Gas Optimizer & live data connectors (Alchemy, Etherscan, The Graph) unlock on Pro.

quickdapp.title: From Prompt to Live dApp — Powered by RemixAI
quickdapp.description: Describe what you want to build in plain language, connect a contract, or both — RemixAI generates a complete, usable web application in seconds. Deploy it to IPFS and give it a permanent home with your own ENS or a Remix subdomain.

features.label: Generate from a text prompt or smart contract — no code needed
Bind to one or multiple contracts on any EVM network
Deploy to IPFS with a custom or Remix ENS address — Pro

pricingTeaser.title: Start Free. Scale as You Build.
pricingTeaser.description: Every plan includes the full Remix toolset. Unlock more power as your projects grow.

goDeeper.title: Everything You Need, Built In
goDeeper.description: From your first line of Solidity to production-grade deployments, Remix has a path for every level.

cards.title: Learn Web3
cards.description: Interactive courses, AI-powered tutoring, and hands-on exercises for Solidity, Vyper, and Noir. The fastest path from zero to your first deployed contract.

cards.title: Pro Dev Tooling
cards.description: Step-through visual debugger, Git integration, OpenZeppelin templates, and a contract library to accelerate every stage of development.

cards.title: 500+ Plugins
cards.description: Extend Remix with ZK proof compilers, Tenderly monitoring, BuildBear sandboxes, Stylus for Arbitrum, and a growing ecosystem of community-built tools.
